Push.name: Bench Press
Push.description: Barbell bench press. Lower to mid-chest with control, press back up without locking out.

Push.name: Shoulder Press
Push.description: Dumbbell shoulder press. Keep core tight, press overhead without arching the lower back.

Push.name: Tricep Rope
Push.description: Cable tricep pushdown with rope. Keep elbows pinned at sides, extend fully and spread rope at the bottom.

Pull.name: Lat Pull Down
Pull.description: Wide grip lat pulldown. Pull bar to upper chest, squeeze lats at the bottom of the movement.

Pull.name: Bicep Curls
Pull.description: Dumbbell bicep curls. Keep elbows pinned to sides, full range of motion, control the eccentric.

Pull.name: Seated Rows
Pull.description: Cable seated row. Pull to lower chest, drive elbows back past body, squeeze shoulder blades together.

Legs.name: Leg Press
Legs.description: Machine leg press. Full depth without knees caving, don't lock out at the top.

Legs.name: Leg Extension
Legs.description: Machine leg extension. Slow eccentric, pause and squeeze quad at full extension.

Legs.name: Leg Curl
Legs.description: Machine leg curl. Curl through full range of motion, control the return.

Legs.name: Calf Raise
Legs.description: Standing or seated calf raise. Full range — pause and stretch at the bottom, squeeze at the top.

Core.name: Crunches
Core.description: Standard crunches. Focus on contracting abs each rep, avoid pulling on your neck.
